description: Style Note   For those who don't want the hassle of tying laces, chill out in style and revel in comfort with these brown slippers from coolers. With their padded footbed and strong grippy outsole, your journey in this footwear will be an assuredly awesome one.Product Details Thick brown strap covering the midfoot and the forefoot with openings for more breathability   Decorative stich detail on the strap   Toe holder for enhanced grip and comfort Padded footbed with reverse nubs for proper Fit TPU outsole with patterned and deep groovesHas an appraised heel   Material and careSynthetic Remove dust with a dry clean cloth
